subcodes.first_line: This is a remembrance from Our presence unto him who hath attained unto the meeting and believed in God, the Lord of all worlds. Know thou that thy letter hath arrived [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا ذکر من لدنا لمن فاز باللقاء و آمن بالله رب العالمین فاعلم قد حضر کتابک
subcodes.subjects: @exhortations and counsels, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
